def positive_python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_walk_without_iterative_guard():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_walk_without_iterative_guard"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag recursive traversals over untrusted depth without iterative fallback or visited tracking."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
